title: Assassin’s Creed Shadows

notes:
I've tried everything I could find online or think of, but the game will not run.
It starts, I get the menu, choose my savegame, and it loads.
But right when I should be able to play, it freezes on a black screen. Audio keeps going, but nothing else happens. One time it actually rendered about 0.5s of frames and then froze.

I tried Different versions of:
- Proton
- GE-Proton (9.20 works on my Steam Deck)
- CachyOS Proton


- Pyroveil
- DXVK-NVAPI fixed to 0.8.0
- setting the upscaler to DLSS
- setting the graphics to Low/Medium
- HDR on, HDR off
- with and without Gamescope

- Lutris
- Bottles
- installing Ubisoft connect through Steam and the game through that

Nothing works :(
title: Assassin’s Creed Shadows

title: Assassin’s Creed Shadows

notes:
I have tried with and without Pyroveil, with and without Gamescope and Frame rate limit, with and without NVAPI, with the CachyOS version of Proton, installing Ubisoft Connect on Steam and launching it from there with different launch options (NVAPI, VXDK SHADER CACHE, PROTON_HIDE_NVIDIA_GPU, etc.)... Just anything I could find online that somebody said it worked for them.
I also tried deleting caches, trying to trick the game into starting on DX11, etc.
I'm at my wit's end, nothing will work and I suspect it has to do with the latest patch for the game, 1.1.1. Which is unfortunate because I unknowingly just bought it on patch day (two days ago), and can't test if it works on the previous patch.
